title: Live-stack: BI Windows mini/DeepSeek too slow for 600s artifact monitor timeout
summary: Raise the agent-mux prompt artifact completion monitor timeout from 600s to 900s after maintainer decision on issue #491.
acceptanceCriteria: The artifact monitor timeout used by bridge-interactive prompt artifact completion is 900000ms.
The timeout value is exported for regression coverage.
Agent-mux launch tests covering launch resolution still pass.
